title: Zipline
description: A free, open-source file uploading service. I self host it, and if you want access, DM me on discord

title: Vanilla
description: A bot that uploads Roblox audios and tells you if they're accepted or denied. Also has some other features like downloading from YouTube with no ads and interruptions, with a 10gb file limit. Invite only, if you wish to have access, DM me on discord
